prompt: A hand-torn, handwritten receipt from “Taquería El Zócalo” in Mexico City. Items include: 3 Tacos al Pastor @ $18 each, 1 Jarritos Mandarin: $20, 1 Churro: $15. Total: $89 MXN. The note is written in blue pen on a perforated pad slip with a carbon copy underneath. Grease marks from the tacos partially obscure one item. It's lying next to a tray with lime wedges and salsa verde.
